prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document specifically presents statistics and findings derived from the Farm Business Survey (FBS) that only pertains to principal farmers in England, as indicated throughout the text. It focuses solely on farming practices, data collection, and economic performance metrics relevant to England.
